anti_pattern_violations.message: TODO stub returns empty results instead of querying IndexStorage. The DaemonServer impl has stub code while DaemonServerContext has the working implementation.
anti_pattern_violations.remediation: Either delegate DaemonServer::handle_search to DaemonServerContext::handle_search, or remove the stub method if DaemonServer is not used in production code paths.

anti_pattern_violations.message: TODO stub returns hardcoded zeros instead of triggering actual indexing. The DaemonServer impl has stub code while DaemonServerContext has the working implementation.
anti_pattern_violations.remediation: Either delegate DaemonServer::handle_index to DaemonServerContext implementation, or remove the stub method if DaemonServer is not used in production code paths.
